overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza, transitioning through a covered commercial walkway and narrow service alley into a bright, crowded city street with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with vehicle barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an open plaza toward a curved building with cyan neon accents

entered.detail: white and orange striped concrete barriers blocking vehicle access to the plaza
futuristic curved commercial structure with bright cyan neon accent lighting along its edges
large potted palm tree with distinctive pink and blue circular base
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide futuristic plaza with concrete barriers arranged in rows. A curved building with prominent cyan neon lighting dominates the left side, while a digital billboard glows overhead. The camera moves forward past a potted palm tree toward a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with adult entertainment venues

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath the curved neon structure with industrial pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under the overhang past neon signs for Suki Hots and El Dorado Pawn Shop

entered.detail: massive cylindrical support columns with exposed piping and industrial detailing
bright pink neon sign reading SUKI HOTS with 18+ symbol and lip icon
storefront with illuminated yellow signage reading EL DORADO PAWN SHOP
purple and red automated vending machine with BURRITO text visible

segments.scene_description: Moving under the curved structure, the scene becomes sheltered with artificial neon lighting dominating the view. Massive industrial pillars line the path while bright pink neon signs for Suki Hots and El Dorado Pawn Shop illuminate the right side. The camera continues forward through this covered commercial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with industrial ventilation

events.description: entering narrow alleyway between tall buildings with yellow tactile paving
approaching the bright exit at the end of the dark alley

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit narrow passage with yellow tactile paving on the ground

entered.detail: large circular industrial exhaust fan mounted on the building wall
elevated walkway or bridge connecting the buildings above the alley
yellow textured ground surface marking the path through the alley

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow, enclosed service alley with dark walls and industrial elements. A large ventilation fan is visible on the left wall while yellow tactile paving guides the path forward. The camera moves toward a bright opening at the far end where daylight becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with large digital billboards

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into bright sunlit urban street
crowd of pedestrians becomes visible in the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along a crowded sidewalk among pedestrians in a bustling commercial district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians crossing the walkway in various directions

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying AVANTE advertisement with human figure
mature deciduous trees lining the sidewalk providing shade
chain link security fence with white covering material
high-rise structures with multiple digital advertisements and futuristic facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark alley, the scene opens into a bright sunlit commercial street filled with pedestrians. Tall buildings covered in digital billboards line the street, with the prominent AVANTE billboard visible on the right. Trees provide shade on the left while crowds of people walk in various directions across the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit futuristic plaza through a series of enclosed corridors and into a bright, bustling city street. It begins by moving past concrete barriers and a cyan-lit curved building toward a covered walkway entrance. As the camera passes under the structure, the open air is replaced by a sheltered commercial corridor dominated by massive industrial pillars and glowing pink neon signs. The scene then shifts into a narrow, dark service alley characterized by industrial ventilation fans and yellow tactile paving before moving toward a bright opening at the far end. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a sunlit commercial district filled with pedestrians, towering buildings, and massive digital billboards.
